description: 第一人称主格，永远大写。
examples_json: [{"en":"I am a student.","zh":"我是学生。"}]

description: be动词第一人称单数。I am缩写为I'm。
examples_json: [{"en":"I am happy.","zh":"我开心。"}]
[{"en":"My name is Tom.","zh":"我的名字是汤姆。"}]
[{"en":"I'm from China.","zh":"我来自中国。"}]
[{"en":"You are very kind.","zh":"你很善良。"}]

description: be动词复数/第二人称。You/We/They are。
examples_json: [{"en":"They are my friends.","zh":"他们是我的朋友。"}]

description: 疑问副词。How are you? = 你好吗。
examples_json: [{"en":"How are you? I'm fine.","zh":"你好吗？我很好。"}]

description: 第三人称单数中性。指代事物/动物。
examples_json: [{"en":"It is a book.","zh":"它是一本书。"}]

description: be动词第三人称单数。He/She/It is。
examples_json: [{"en":"She is a teacher.","zh":"她是一名老师。"}]
[{"en":"What is your name?","zh":"你叫什么名字？"}]

[{"en":"It is in the bag.","zh":"它在包里。"}]
[{"en":"The book is on the desk.","zh":"书在桌子上。"}]
[{"en":"They are at home.","zh":"他们在家。"}]
[{"en":"He is my brother.","zh":"他是我的兄弟。"}]
[{"en":"She is a doctor.","zh":"她是一名医生。"}]
[{"en":"Who is that girl?","zh":"那个女孩是谁？"}]
aren't = are not。
sort_order: [{"en":"He is not a teacher.","zh":"他不是老师。"}]

examples_json: [{"en":"We are good friends.","zh":"我们是好朋友。"}]
[{"en":"They are from China.","zh":"他们来自中国。"}]

description: 开心的/快乐的。I'm happy = 我很开心。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm happy to see you.","zh":"我很高兴见到你。"}]
[{"en":"Hello! How are you?","zh":"你好！你怎么样？"}]
[{"en":"Goodbye! See you later!","zh":"再见！回头见！"}]
[{"en":"Good morning! How are you today?","zh":"早上好！你今天怎么样？"}]
[{"en":"Good afternoon! Nice to see you.","zh":"下午好！很高兴见到你。"}]
[{"en":"Good evening! How was your day?","zh":"晚上好！你今天过得怎么样？"}]
[{"en":"Nice to meet you! — Nice to meet you too.","zh":"很高兴认识你！——我也是。"}]
[{"en":"See you later! — See you!","zh":"回头见！——再见！"}]
[{"en":"Take care! — I will. Bye!","zh":"保重！——我会的。拜！"}]
[{"en":"Welcome! Please come in.","zh":"欢迎！请进。"}]
[{"en":"How's it going? — Pretty good.","zh":"最近怎么样？——还不错。"}]
[{"en":"What's up? — Not much.","zh":"怎么样？——没什么。"}]
[{"en":"Nice weather today!","zh":"今天天气真好！"}]

description: 周末。常用来问候："How was your weekend?"。
examples_json: [{"en":"How was your weekend? — It was great!","zh":"你周末过得怎么样？——很棒！"}]
[{"en":"Long time no see! How are you?","zh":"好久不见！你怎么样？"}]

description: 又/再。It's nice to see you again。
examples_json: [{"en":"It's nice to see you again!","zh":"很高兴再次见到你！"}]
